title: Fix Modal worker typing_extensions cold start failure
description: Modal ViZipVoice worker accepts TTS jobs but fails after cold start with cannot import name Sentinel from typing_extensions. Pin runtime dependency, verify service tests, redeploy Modal, then run an AudioWeb real TTS smoke through the deployed service.
acceptance_criteria: Modal worker runtime can import typing_extensions.Sentinel; modal deploy succeeds; live /v1/tts/jobs job reaches succeeded and serves WAV; AudioWeb local real-provider flow receives completed job/audio.
notes: After adding tensorboard and redeploying, live Modal job fc-01KTE5FQ8GEM8CEBM2MCFNK94W now fails at another Modal-overlay typing_extensions gap: cannot import name NoExtraItems. Extending typing compatibility shim.
close_reason: Fixed Modal worker runtime deps/typing shim and verified live TTS job succeeds.

title: Build async TTS service for Docker and Modal
close_reason: Implemented async TTS service, Docker image, and Modal L4 cold-start deploy
